title: hydrocotyle leucocephala
intro: Hydrocotyle leucocephala, also known as locally known as "Pikalili" or "Pakalana" in some regions, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands, belonging to the family Araliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle leucocephala include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The herbal preparations of Hydrocotyle leucocephala can be made into tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is often used in traditional medicine in various forms, including tinctures and capsules.
